meta.title: Mouthguards for Teeth Grinding & Sports | Prudentia Dental
meta.description: Custom night guards and sport mouthguards to protect your teeth from grinding and injuries. Prevent dental damage with our precision-fit solutions.

hero.title: Mouthguards for Teeth Grinding & Sports Injuries
hero.subtitle: Protect Your Smile. Prevent Future Damage.

intro.text: Many people unknowingly grind their teeth during stressful moments or while sleeping, a condition known as bruxism. While this habit is involuntary, the pressure it places on your teeth and jaw can lead to long-term dental issues, including microfractures, enamel wear, and TMJ problems.

symptoms.title: Common Symptoms of Teeth Grinding:
items: Interrupted sleep or discomfort at night

nightGuard.title: Night Guards: Protection While You Sleep
nightGuard.description: At Prudentia Micro Dental Care, we provide customized night guards tailored to your unique bite. These are designed to:
items: Alleviate jaw tension and morning headaches
Reduce the risk of developing Temporomandibular Joint (TMJ) issues
Improve overall sleep quality and comfort
nightGuard.footer: Each night guard is precision-fit to your mouth for maximum comfort and effectiveness, ensuring restful sleep and long-term protection.

sportGuard.title: Custom Sport Guards: Protection During Physical Activity
sportGuard.description: Whether you're on the field or at the gym, dental injuries are common during contact sports and high-impact activities. A custom sport mouthguard acts as a shield over your upper teeth, lowering the risk of:
sportGuard.footer: Our sport guards are designed for athletes of all ages and are crafted for optimal fit, durability, and comfort.

benefits.title: Why Choose a Custom-Fitted Mouthguard?
items: Superior comfort compared to over-the-counter guards
Designed specifically for your bite and jaw alignment
Better compliance and ease of use
Provides muscle relaxation and helps relieve clenching-induced stress

cta.title: Ready to Protect Your Teeth?
cta.description: Whether you're managing nighttime grinding or need protection during sports, a custom mouthguard is a smart, preventive solution. At Prudentia Micro Dental Care, Pimple Saudagar we're here to help you safeguard your smile with comfort and precision.
cta.button: Book a Micro-Consultation today to find the right mouthguard for you.
